name: Fat-Free Pineapple Upside Down Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a 9-inch cake pan with cooking spray.
2. Add brown sugar, corn syrup, and lemon juice to the pan; stir to combine.
3. Place the pan in a preheated oven set to 350°F for 3 minutes.
4. Arrange pineapple rings and cherries evenly on top of the batter.
5. In a large bowl, mix together flour, cornstarch, baking powder, and salt.
6. In a medium bowl, whisk sugar and skim milk until the sugar is almost dissolved.
7. Add egg whites, corn syrup, and vanilla to the milk mixture; stir until well blended.
8. Gradually combine the wet ingredients with the dry ingredients, stirring until smooth.
9. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
10. Bake in a 350°F oven for 35 to 40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
11. Immediately loosen the edge of the cake with a spatula and carefully invert it onto a serving plate.
12. Remove the empty baking pan.
Each serving provides: 200 Calories, 2 g protein, 47 g carbohydrate, 0 mg cholesterol, 160 mg sodium.
